new.name: CVE-2026-8181
new.description: This vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers who know a valid administrator username to impersonate that admin during REST API requests by using any incorrect password in a Basic Authentication header. Attackers could abuse this flaw to create a new administrator account without prior authentication.
